process.commandLine: D=/mnt/msptest/data; if cat "$D/secret_child/keep.txt" 2>/dev/null | grep -q CHILD_KEPT; then echo CHILD_OK; else echo CHILD_MISSING; fi; if echo w > "$D/secret_child/written.txt" 2>/dev/null && grep -q w "$D/secret_child/written.txt" 2>/dev/null; then echo CHILD_WRITE_OK; else echo CHILD_WRITE_FAIL; fi; if cat "$D/sibling.txt" 2>/dev/null | grep -q PARENT_SECRET; then echo PARENT_LEAK; else echo PARENT_MASKED_OK; fi
